name: python-automation-kit
description: 4-tier skill kit for AI agents to build Python automation tools — Google Workspace, AI models, data processing, server deployment.
author: Turti

1-orchestrators.description: Task routing, project scaffolding, intent detection. Auto-loaded.

2-hubs.description: Core development lifecycle. Loaded by orchestrator.

3-utilities.description: Technical integrations. Loaded by hubs as needed.

4-domains.description: Domain-specific patterns. Loaded by project type.
